reference: I have severe anxiety and panic attacks with longstanding depression. Xanax helps, but I cannot get a physician to prescribe a dosage strong enough that I feel is beneficial to me. I am not looking to get high; I am just looking forward to being able to have a more normal life. I have panic attacks that make me feel as though I have pressure on my chest and cannot breathe. I have tremors that are noticeable by other people, which makes me feel more anxious. I am in a horrible cycle, and I feel as though doctors think I just want more Xanax. It helps me tremendously by decreasing the intensity of the attacks. Please, any suggestions? Severely nervous and sleepless in New York.
